Set URL
func:
const pl = msg.payload
let nodeId = pl.match(/NODE_ID=(?<nodeId>[^\n\r]+)/).groups.nodeId
let ssid = `AryaOS-${nodeId.substr(-4, 4)}`

let wifiUrl = `WIFI:S:${ssid};T:;P:;H:false;`
msg.qrcodeinput = wifiUrl
msg.ssid = ssid
return msg;

format:
Configuration and services are managed outside Node-RED:

  • HTTPS portal — live status
  • Cockpit — services, Charontak, feeders
  • Comitup — WiFi join

This dashboard keeps maps, TFR, and recorder only.
